title: What's New on MedlinePlus
text:
alth Topics Name Changes
The following health topics have new topic names:

August 22, 2019
New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus
Ten new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus
Aldosterone test Hearing Tests for Adults Hearing Tests for Children Glomerular Filtration Rate (GFR) Test Balance Tests Videoonystagmography (VNG) Burn Evaluation Malaria Tests Neurological Exam Trichomoniasis Test 
August 15, 2019
New Page on MedlinePlus for All of Us Research Program Participants
Current and future participants of the NIH All of Us Research Program can now access trusted, understandable health information from MedlinePlus all in one place .
August 14, 2019
Welcome to the What's New page
This page will provide regular information about news, changes, and updates to MedlinePlus.
